<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue\Events; class JobRetryRequested { /** * The decoded job payload. * * @var array|null */ protected $payload = null; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param \stdClass $job The job instance. */ public function __construct( public $job, ) { } /** * The job payload. * * @return array */ public function payload() { if (is_null($this->payload)) { $this->payload = json_decode($this->job->payload, true); } return $this->payload; } }
